description: Conversation test with tool usage and Polly TTS audio input
sonic_system_prompt: You are a helpful travel assistant. Use tools to provide accurate information about bookings, destinations, and rewards. Keep your responses short max 1-2 sentences. Remember you are a spoken agent.

toolSpec.name: getBookingDetails
toolSpec.description: Retrieve booking details for a customer

toolSpec.name: searchDestinations
toolSpec.description: Search for travel destinations and get recommendations

toolSpec.name: getRewardsBalance
toolSpec.description: Get rewards points balance and tier information

user_system_prompt: You are a user asking about travel bookings, destinations, and rewards points. Be natural and conversational. You should ask about Paris and then your rewards once you get response. Keep responses less than 2000 characters. Remember you are talking on the phone. Don't generate any markdown.

evaluation_criteria.user_goal: Ask about Paris destinations and check rewards balance
evaluation_criteria.assistant_objective: Provide helpful travel assistance using available tools
